query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM billing_visit_events) as visit_events,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM billing_cycles) as cycles,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM billing_cycle_configs) as cycle_configs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status IN ('signed','revised')) as signed_reports;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Me9dVE4fH3ZyTq.ed3df32c863d --database cTdrattvNQ95XCgX9zeyNM --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM billing_visit_events) as visit_events,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM billing_cycles) as cycles,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM billing_cycle_configs) as cycle_configs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status IN ('signed','revised')) as signed_reports;
